title: Older Adults with Oral Thrush: 11 Herbal Tinctures to Try
description: Trifolium pratense tinctures may help with oral thrush due to its antifungal and antibacterial properties. Red clover, the plant from which the tincture is made, contains isoflavones, such as formononetin and genistein, which have been shown to have antifungal effects. The tincture may also contain other compounds like flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties that can help soothe and protect the oral mucosa.
